summary_en: 14,705,300 shares (3.69% of issued shares outstanding) to be cancelled effective 2026-06-12. Post-cancellation issued share count: 383,176,500.
title_en: Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On 21 May 2026, Osaka Gas Co., Ltd. announced the cancellation of 14,705,300 treasury shares of common stock, representing 3.69% of issued shares outstanding. The cancellation is scheduled for 12 June 2026. Following the cancellation, the company's total issued share count will be 383,176,500 shares.
